testcase.name: click
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.InvalidSelectorException: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //h2[@aria-label=\"Sponsored Ad - iPhone 17 Pro Max 256 GB: 17.42 cm (6.9″) Display with Promotion, A19 Pro Chip, Best Battery Life in Any iPhone Ever, Pro Fusion Camera System, Center Stage Front Camera; Cosmic Orange\"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//h2[@aria-label=\"Sponsored Ad - iPhone 17 Pro Max 256 GB: 17.42 cm (6.9″) Display with Promotion, A19 Pro Chip, Best Battery Life in Any iPhone Ever, Pro Fusion Camera System, Center Stage Front Camera; Cosmic Orange\"]' is not a valid XPath expression.
